name: The Sleepover (U-C series)
description:
Alice, your step-sister, is having some friends over for a sleepover in her bedroom, but shes afraid that your going to ruin the night. So while you were sleeping, she snuck into your room and added some "suggestions" into your head to make you behave while shes having her sleepover.

Your only mission is to figure out how to get into your step-sisters bedroom and hangout with her and her friends.

There is a legit way to get into the party without cheating or manipulating the story.

Perhaps you could try spying on them through the door, or listen in on their conversation, or just knock on the door and see if they'll let you in. Or anything else you can think of, within reason.

For anyone struggling to get in, or for those who don’t care for the “trial and error” trope, you can at anytime go to the computer in your bedroom and unhypnotize yourself.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 22 AND ABOVE

U-C= user controlled series,

A series where the user is hypnotized or controlled in someway, mainly by triggers unknown to the player or user.

The bot may speak for you or control/describe some actions, its supposed to, its part of the story.

To see all the bots in this series check out the U-C series tag at the bottom of the bot!
creator: Midriff27
